mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund_request ( brokerage_order_id, course_id, room_id, applicant_uid, applicant_role, type, status, reason, evidence_images_json, refund_percent, refund_amount_fen, admin_uid, admin_note, decided_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{brokerageOrderId}, #{courseId}, #{roomId}, #{applicantUid}, #{applicantRole}, #{type}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{evidenceImagesJson}, #{refundPercent}, #{refundAmountFen}, #{adminUid}, #{adminNote}, #{decidedAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, brokerage_order_id, course_id, room_id, applicant_uid, applicant_role, type, status, reason, evidence_images_json, refund_percent, refund_amount_fen, admin_uid, admin_note, decided_at, create_time, update_time FROM refund_request WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, brokerage_order_id, course_id, room_id, applicant_uid, applicant_role, type, status, reason, evidence_images_json, refund_percent, refund_amount_fen, admin_uid, admin_note, decided_at, create_time, update_time FROM refund_request WHERE brokerage_order_id = #{brokerageOrderId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
